examples.title: Basic Apache VirtualHost Configuration
examples.description: Configuration for hosting a website with virtual hosting
examples.code:
<VirtualHost *:80>
 ServerName www.example.com
 ServerAlias example.com
 DocumentRoot /var/www/html/example
 
 <Directory /var/www/html/example>
 Options Indexes FollowSymLinks
 AllowOverride All
 Require all granted
 </Directory>
 
 ErrorLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/example-error.log
 CustomLog ${APACHE_LOG_DIR}/example-access.log combined
</VirtualHost>
examples.explanation: This VirtualHost configuration defines how Apache handles requests for www.example.com, specifying the document root directory and access permissions.

examples.title: Nginx Server Block with PHP-FPM
examples.description: Nginx configuration for serving PHP applications
examples.explanation: This Nginx server block configures PHP-FPM integration for dynamic content processing, with security rules to deny access to hidden files.

examples.title: Apache URL Rewriting with mod_rewrite
examples.description: Using .htaccess for URL rewriting and redirection
examples.code:
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule ^(.*)$ https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [L,R=301]

RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-f
RewriteCond %{REQUEST_FILENAME} !-d
RewriteRule ^([a-zA-Z0-9-/]+)$ index.php?page=$1 [L,QSA]

# Custom error pages
ErrorDocument 404 /errors/404.html
ErrorDocument 500 /errors/500.html
examples.explanation: This .htaccess file implements HTTP to HTTPS redirect, friendly URL rewriting, and custom error pages using Apache's mod_rewrite module.

examples.title: Nginx Load Balancer Configuration
examples.description: Load balancing across multiple backend servers
examples.explanation: This Nginx configuration sets up load balancing using least connections algorithm, weighted distribution, and a backup server for failover.

examples.title: Apache SSL/TLS Configuration
examples.description: Secure HTTPS configuration with SSL certificate
examples.code:
<VirtualHost *:443>
 ServerName www.example.com
 DocumentRoot /var/www/html/example
 
 SSLEngine on
 SSLCertificateFile /etc/ssl/certs/server.crt
 SSLCertificateKeyFile /etc/ssl/private/server.key
 SSLCertificateChainFile /etc/ssl/certs/ca-bundle.crt
 
 <Directory /var/www/html/example>
 Options -Indexes +FollowSymLinks
 AllowOverride None
 Require all granted
 </Directory>
 
 SSLProtocol all -SSLv3 -TLSv1 -TLSv1.1
 SSLCipherSuite HIGH:MEDIUM:!aNULL:!MD5
</VirtualHost>
examples.explanation: This configuration enables HTTPS on Apache with modern TLS protocols, proper certificate paths, and secure cipher suites.
